refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and combines derivation, recording, and management of performance requirements. Refining clarifies these distinct functions to enable targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify derivation by comparing generated performance targets against worksite inputs; verify recording by audit of documented requirements and traceability; verify management by reviewing history logs of baselines and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements with traceability to inputs
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine with input data parsing and analytics
Centralized requirements database with version control and traceability
Update management system with baseline and calibration tracking
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, recording database, and update management

potential_sources: Derivation algorithms tightly coupled with input data formats
Database schema coupling with update management logic
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not tightly controlled
High safety criticality requires robust verification and audit trails
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level software and data management components responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and update management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time worksite mission context and operational data for derivation inputs

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to vehicle control and operator tasking modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation across distributed system components

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary container for integrated performance requirements management; high containment, low diffusion
Vehicle module consumes performance targets but does not contain derivation or management logic
Teleoperation module interfaces with performance targets but no containment
Safety Services may consume performance data for alerts but no containment

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirements derivation and management within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and safety criticality.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of interface overload on Network Link if data synchronization is not optimized
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth; consider splitting update management into a submodule within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical grouping and traceability; coupling is acceptable.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution
Interfaces are well defined and limited to known external interfaces
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the assignment; NGHE Solution is the natural ownership boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data audits, database record inspections, and update history reviews within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing update management if complexity increases
Ensure interface bandwidth on Network Link is sufficient for synchronization needs

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear traceability. No further decomposition is needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements with traceability to inputs
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Current artifacts satisfy the task requirements and constraints.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integration complexity
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in update management
Interface bandwidth constraints on Network Link
evidence_needed: Telemetry data availability and quality reports
Performance of NGHE Solution under load
Audit logs of performance requirement updates
